title: Project Cabinet coherence status read-only
goal: Expose Cabinet map/frontier, Bureau queue/import state, PR/CI status and agent-lane state as a read-only projection for Leitstand or Schauwerk.

metadata.safety_boundary: gated design and registration only; no dispatch, merge, runtime mutation, credential exposure or automatic queue mutation

acceptance.assertion: Projection distinguishes Cabinet canon, Bureau registry, GitHub/CI facts, runtime facts and display state.
The projection cannot approve, dispatch, import, merge or mutate queue/runtime state.
Blocked candidates and missing evidence are visible instead of smoothed over.
The Ecosystem Registry Map remains linked as the orientation surface.
